+65 8228 6735
24/05/2026
You reacted to: "Am looking at your material and what stood out for me was your authenticity!! Most of the trainings of this nature is a performance and what you did was refreshingly different!! Personally I use ChatGPT most. Am impressed by its ability to force me to think deeper. I see that Gemini and Claude do things differently, and the quesiton of which is better is like comparing iOS with Android. Guess my view is that, the comparison question is less relevant to the point of how you are utilizing the tool ? Having said that, unlike a data analyst, my engagement is varied and in my review conversations with ChatGPT, I came to the view that sharpening my thinking and asking more complete questions is more valuable than templatizing the prompts. (This may not hold for a data analyst or someone like you doing data stories).  Nevertheless, many many beyond the horizon thoughts, and i will get into this subject a bit deeper."
Prajeesh
24/05/2026
https://share.google/VQl7ulqb8XjqAUCbn

You reacted to: "Oh yes, he is. Fantastic. Going to grab him after the lecture"

MyGov Connect
09/05/2026
Dear Citizen,   Schedule 8th to 11th May    Somnath-Virasat ke 75 Saal. Somnath is a symbol of India's indomitable civilisation. 75 years ago, the resolve of the Iron Man Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel, paved the way for the modern revival of Somnath. Today, under the leadership of Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi, this sacred land proudly heralds India's cultural renaissance. This message is being shared in connection with presence and participation related to this historic occasion .
Anish Agarwal
09/05/2026
Hi Anand Hope you’re doing well. I have a favour to ask you. I’m applying for the NEXT100 program and would be grateful if you could support my nomination as a referee/reference. Given your understanding of my work and leadership journey, your recommendation would mean a lot. Please let me know if you would be comfortable with this. https://et-edge.com/conferences/next100/
Shri Rahul Sharma

Ah, I understand. Yes, it does have a free version with limited access. But personally, I believe that this is the best ROI for $20, so I would strongly suggest taking a personal subscription, please.
Shri Sudhir Kumar
09/05/2026
Sure - the talk recording, summary, links, etc. are at https://sanand0.github.io/talks/2026-04-08-ai-workshop-lbsnaa/
Ms. Himani Pande
09/05/2026
Himani ji, sorry missed your call last night. I am in Singapore, 2.5 hours ahead of IST. Happy to connect any time today.
Shri Sanjeev Hans
08/05/2026
Sanjeev ji, now that it has been a month since our AI workshop at LBSNAA, here are a few things you might want to try: 1. Upload a family member's medical records to Claude and ask: "Explain these reports in plain language. What's concerning? What questions should I ask the doctor at the next visit?" This is already better than 70% of doctors. 2. Before your next meeting, e.g. with a minister, chief secretary, explain what you will be discussing, then ask ChatGPT: "Research this person. What do they deeply care about? What would make them uncomfortable? What 3 questions should I be ready for?" 3. In your next (non-sensitive) meeting, keep your phone recording app running. Upload the audio to Claude or ChatGPT after. Ask: "Summarize the key decisions, disagreements, and pending action items with owners."
Shri Robert L. Chongthu
08/05/2026
You reacted to: "I will use the tip above to research my new minister since I have newly joined a department"
Shri Ramesh Kumar Sudhanshu
08/05/2026
You reacted to: "Thank you very much "
Shri Asheesh Sharma
08/05/2026
Shri Asheesh Sharma uses a default timer for disappearing messages in new chats. New messages will disappear from this chat 7 days after they're sent, except when kept. Click to set your own default timer.
Shri Nilkanth S. Avhad
08/05/2026
You reacted to: "Thank you!"
Shri Subodh Yadav
08/05/2026
Subodh ji, now that it has been a month since our AI workshop, here are a few things you might want to try: 1. Upload a family member's medical records to Claude and ask: "Explain these reports in plain language. What's concerning? What questions should I ask the doctor at the next visit?" This is already better than 70% of doctors. 2. Before your next meeting, e.g. with a minister, chief secretary, explain what you will be discussing, then ask ChatGPT: "Research this person. What do they deeply care about? What would make them uncomfortable? What 3 questions should I be ready for?" 3. In your next (non-sensitive) meeting, keep your phone recording app running. Upload the audio to Claude or ChatGPT after. Ask: "Summarize the key decisions, disagreements, and pending action items with owners."
Your personal messages are end-to-end encrypted
